breakdown: This PR adds normalization for non-standard reward keys (xp→xp_gained, gold_pieces→gold) in streaming passthrough, with a new test that exercises the LLM fallback parser. The core logic is well-structured in world_logic.py with appropriate deep copying and None handling. Minor gaps: no type annotations on the function, and the new function lacks a docstring despite being a public utility.
key_changes: Add xp→xp_gained and gold_pieces→gold fallback mapping in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui
Pop normalized fallback keys after processing to prevent persistence of raw keys
Apply normalize_rewards_box_for_ui to passthrough rewards in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair
Add new E2E test test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py to verify normalization
